titleStmt.title: SII 24.533: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 533. (A.R. No. 171 of 1951-52.) III PRĀKĀRA, NĀḺIKĒṬṬĀṈ-VĀŚAL, SOUTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE PROPER RIGHT NICHE IN THE PASSAGE

summary.p: Registers a poliyūṭṭu gift by Cheruku Chennamanāyakaṉ for various offerings on the occasion when the deity was brought and seated in the maṇḍapa in the grove which was also granted by the donor to the deity. The writing is very faint and illegible and is a palimpsest over an earlier record. The preface in Telugu gives the details Uttirāshāḍha of the date viz., Śaka 1572, Vikṛiti, Mārgaśīra, ba. 5, Sunday, and the Tamil section that follows gives the details of date viz., Śaka 1572, Vikṛiti, Vṛiśchika, śu. 5, Sunday, Uttiraṭṭādi. The intended date seems to be 1650 A.D., November 17, when the paksha was śukla and the star was Uttarāshāḍha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1522 Ayina vikṛtināma saṁvatsaraṁ mā¨rgaśiramāsaṁ kṛṣṇapakṣaṁ paṁccamī Ādivāra Uttarāṣātha
nakṣatramaṁdu raṁganāthasvāmi śrī bhaṁḍārānaku Aḍiyev ceraku pautṛṁḍu veṁggaḷappanāyani putṛṁḍu cennama nāyaṁḍu daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci ceśina kaiṁkarya patraṁ
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 5 100 7 10 2 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vikuṟuti samvassarattu viṟuccikaṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣa
ttu pañcamiyum Ātityavāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatrattuṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulācaṉi vaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvarāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭu
tiruvaraṅkam tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅgaṉātatevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ cerukkar Ā ṉāyakkar pavuttiraṉ ve
ṅkaḷappaṉāyakkar puttiraṉ ceṉṉamaṉāyakkaneṉ teṇṭaṉ camarpittu poliyūṭṭu cilācātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Aṭiyeṉuṭaya Upaiyam kiṣṇarāyar
tiru(ṉā)nāḷai 5- tiruṉāḷaikku Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyat tiruttoppu maṇṭapattil Eṟi Aruḷukaikkut tirukkuttumaṇiviḷakku neyyamutupaṭi U tiruvanti
kkāppukku ppaṭi n=taṟṟattukku E Amutuceytaruḷukiṟa cemattaḷikai 6 kku pon_ 4yum 8
3 100 kku pon_ 4 yum 2 tocai 3 100 kku pon_ 4yum 2 veccamutukūṉ 4 10kku pon_ 4yum
paruppu Amutu Ilaiyamutu neyamutu vilai U 2 tayiramutu
100 kku U 6 10 kku Ilaiyamutu 1000 kku U 9
The details Of the provision for various Offerings Are Enumerated
Digital edition of SII 24.533 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
